allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('cached:', d['cached']\); print\('offer count:', len\(d['offers']\)\); print\('errors:', list\(d['errors'].keys\(\)\)\); print\('sample titles:', [o['title'] for o in d['offers'][:3]]\)")
